PreToolUse.command: bash -c 'TOOL_NAME=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".toolName // empty"); COMMAND=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r ".parameters.command // empty"); if [[ "$TOOL_NAME" == "run_in_terminal" && "$COMMAND" == git\ commit* ]]; then cd /tmp/peachtree && echo "[PeachTree] Running pre-commit quality checks..." >&2 && pytest -q && ruff check src/ tests/ && mypy src/peachtree/ --strict && peachtree policy && echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\": {\"hookEventName\": \"PreToolUse\", \"permissionDecision\": \"allow\"}}" || (echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\": {\"hookEventName\": \"PreToolUse\", \"permissionDecision\": \"deny\", \"permissionDecisionReason\": \"Quality gates failed. All checks must pass before commit: pytest -q && ruff check && mypy --strict && peachtree policy\"}}"; exit 2); else echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\": {\"hookEventName\": \"PreToolUse\", \"permissionDecision\": \"allow\"}}"; fi'
